name: Witch's familiar: a spirit-animal bond between practitioner and a tutelary entity. FSPLIT: the familiar departs the witch's body, splitting awareness into the witch's perspective and the familiar's remote perception. FFUSE: the familiar returns, merging the two streams of experience into one enriched awareness. VINIT: the unbonded practitioner. TANCH: the bond itself as the container. AFWD: the familiar ventures forth. AREV: the familiar returns home. ENGAGR: the familiar is simultaneously an extension of the witch and an independent being — the paradox of the familiar bond.

phase_0.domain_name: Witch's familiar: a spirit-animal bond between practitioner and a tutelary entity. FSPLIT: the familiar departs the witch's body, splitting awareness into the witch's perspective and the familiar's remote perception. FFUSE: the familiar returns, merging the two streams of experience into one enriched awareness. VINIT: the unbonded practitioner. TANCH: the bond itself as the container. AFWD: the familiar ventures forth. AREV: the familiar returns home. ENGAGR: the familiar is simultaneously an extension of the witch and an independent being — the paradox of the familiar bond.
phase_0.boundary_condition: the bond itself as the container

VINIT.justification: void/uninitialized state before any bond exists

TANCH.justification: terminal anchor that contains and defines the entire familiar relationship

AFWD.justification: forward morphism from witch to familiar's remote perception

AREV.justification: reverse morphism bringing perception back to the witch

CLINK.justification: composition of departure and return as a single operation

IMSCRIB.justification: identity/self-recognition that persists through the bond

FSPLIT.justification: splits awareness into witch's perspective and familiar's remote perception

FFUSE.justification: merges the two streams of experience into one enriched awareness

EVALT.justification: affirmative state where familiar returns with useful information

EVALF.justification: negative state where familiar is lost or bond is severed

ENGAGR.chosen_element: familiar as extension and independent being
ENGAGR.justification: paradox of being simultaneously part of witch and separate entity

IFIX.justification: irreversible fixation of the familiar's true name or pact

phase_2.split_input: unified awareness of witch and familiar
phase_2.fuse_result: unified awareness of witch and familiar

phase_3.both_description: familiar simultaneously present and absent (astral projection)

steps.domain_action: Step 1 IMSCRIB: practitioner recognizes own self as unbonded
Step 2 AREV:   practitioner descends into meditative state to invite familiar
Step 3 FSPLIT: familiar departs, splitting awareness into two streams
Step 4 AFWD:   familiar ventures forth to gather information
Step 5 FFUSE:  familiar returns, merging awareness back into one
Step 6 CLINK:  practitioner composes the experience into a coherent narrative
Step 7 IFIX:   practitioner records the familiar's report in a permanent journal
Step 8 IMSCRIB: practitioner recognizes self as bonded and enriched

phase_5.ipc_mechanism: empathic link between witch and familiar
phase_5.memory_mechanism: the familiar's true name and pact

phase_6.cycle_cost: mana or spiritual energy per cycle
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — energy is conserved; awareness is reorganized, not created or destroyed
